blocks.body: Alternative Questions — Questions with a choice between options.

{ "title": "10. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Alternative questions — a question with a choice between options through OR.", "Structure: as Yes/No question + or + alternative.", "Answer — choose one option, NOT Yes/No.", "With do/does/did: Do you walk or drive? Did she buy A or B?", "With to be: Is it hot or cold? Are you A or B?", "With modals: Can you swim or dive? will you come today or tomorrow? (both).", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Intonation - falls on the last option." ] }
